set.body: If a new_adgeMatrix_deferred object (host @x = NaN placeholders) is bound to an am_product_plan, then amatrix_release_resident is called on it, the plan's fallback path on next invocation either throws 'deferred adgeMatrix lost its GPU resident data' or silently computes with NaN data depending on path taken. No guard in the plan prevents invocation after release. Fix: validate residency before plan execute, or pin the resident handle while plan is alive. Found by round 2 hunt amatrix-5y1, hunter 04.
set.title: Deferred adgeMatrix in product plan dangles after release (product-plan.R:232-261)
